# OSKOL-MET-TRADE LLC

> Russian B2B industrial company founded in 1994. Supplies metalworking
> equipment (CNC, robotic lines), metallurgical raw materials (ferrochrome,
> manganese ore, NPI), industrial furnaces (vacuum, induction, gas),
> and operates own metalworking plant VSZ in Voronezh.
> INN: 3127508337. Markets: Russia, CIS, China, India.

## Key pages

- [Company overview](/en/company)
- [Metalworking equipment](/en/equipment)
- [Metallurgical raw materials](/en/materials)
- [Metallurgical furnaces](/en/furnaces)
- [VSZ production](/en/vsz)

- [Glossary of metallurgical terms](/en/glossary)
